lines.speaker: Quartermaster
lines.text: Good day [sir/miss]. I'm the quartermaster for this camp. We have a little we could trade here.

lines.speaker: Quartermaster
lines.text: We should be getting a new stock soon. Would you like a look at what we do have?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please. What are you selling?

lines.speaker: Quartermaster
lines.text: Good day [sir/miss]. I'm the quartermaster for this camp. We have a little we could trade here.

lines.speaker: Quartermaster
lines.text: We have a new stock of dragon halberds. Would you like a look at what we have?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please. What are you selling?
